top_signals.title: RBC Says Stocks Can Weather Fed Hikes, But Not Too Many
top_signals.summary: Lori Calvasina, head of US equity strategy research at RBC Capital Markets, says the strength of US corporate earnings is propping up stocks amid concern that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates. But there are limits to how many hikes the market can withstand, she says on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
top_signals.summary: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: TFS, WEX roll out equipment financing program as trucking industry rebounds
top_signals.summary:
TFS and WEX are targeting owner-operators and large fleets with a new financing program for trucks, trailers and other assets.

The post TFS, WEX roll out equipment financing program as trucking industry rebounds appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia

top_signals.title: Government procurement to prioritise national security
top_signals.summary: Chancellor and Chief Secretary to the Prime Minister announce new drive to use power of public spending to strengthen national security and economic resilience.

top_signals.title: EUR trading accounts for 1% of Binance spot volume, CryptoQuant says
top_signals.summary: Euro-denominated trading accounts for around 1% of Binance's spot volume, according to CryptoQuant data, as the exchange faces uncertainty ahead of MiCA's July 1 deadline.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: City law firm denies ties to KPMG Australia scandal
top_signals.summary: City-headquartered law firm Ashurst has denied its involvement in investigating allegations at KPMG Australia as the Big Four firms’ scandal fallout continues to heat up down under.  Ashurst reportedly carried out an investigation from June to August 2025 over allegations made by a whistleblower against an unnamed former executive, following the Big Four firm conducting [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: MoneyGram becomes Solana validator, expands blockchain payments strategy
top_signals.summary: Solana is now the third blockchain where MoneyGram operates an official validator, alongside Tempo and the Midnight Network.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
